description.ko: 기술과 빛이 충돌하는 미래로 발을 들여보세요. 네온-V는 거대한 메갈로폴리스의 미로 같은 거리를 항해하며, 전기와 네온으로 타오르는 하이테크 지하 세계의 정신을 구현합니다.
description.en: Step into a future where technology and light collide. The NEON-V navigates the labyrinthine streets of a sprawling megalopolis, embodying the spirit of a high-tech underworld fueled by electricity and neon.

prompt: Cinematic shot of a sleek, high-tech NEON-V vehicle gliding through a rain-slicked cyberpunk street at night. Vibrant pink and cyan neon signs reflecting on wet asphalt, towering holographic advertisements, dense urban architecture, volumetric fog, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed 8k, synthwave aesthetic.
